overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a truck driving simulator, showing a nighttime drive through heavy snowfall on a multi-lane highway. The driver approaches an intersection, stops at a red traffic light, and continues onto an exit ramp while snow accumulates on the windshield.

events.description: approaching intersection with traffic light visible ahead in the distance

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on snow-covered highway, maintaining speed while heavy snow falls and street lights illuminate the road

notable_agents.action: car driving in adjacent lane, overtaking the truck

entered.detail: truck dashboard with illuminated gauges and controls visible in the cabin
black steering wheel with Mercedes logo at the center
side mirror showing snowy road behind on the left
side mirror mounted on the right side of the cabin
multi-lane road covered in snow with visible lane markings
tall street lights illuminating the snowy road at regular intervals
metal guardrails lining the right side of the highway
trees covered in snow visible beyond the guardrails
highway directional signs visible on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment shows steady highway driving from the truck cabin perspective during a heavy snowstorm at night. The dashboard and steering wheel are prominently visible in the foreground while the snow-covered road stretches ahead, illuminated by street lights. Other vehicles occasionally pass by as the truck approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway intersection with traffic control signals

events.description: truck comes to complete stop at red traffic light, interior cabin bathed in red glow
traffic light changes to green, truck begins accelerating through the intersection

agents.ego_description: bringing the truck to a stop at the red light, waiting for 15 seconds with red interior lighting, then proceeding through the intersection

notable_agents.action: blue car stopped ahead at the traffic light, then moving forward when light turns green

entered.detail: overhead traffic light gantry with red and green signals visible
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the road surface

segments.scene_description: The truck approaches and stops at a red traffic light at a highway intersection. The cabin interior is illuminated by red light from the traffic signal. After waiting, the light turns green and the truck proceeds through the intersection, passing a blue car that was waiting ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp with curved descent

events.description: truck takes exit ramp, steering right to follow the curved road descending from main highway

agents.ego_description: driving along the highway before taking the exit ramp, navigating the curved snow-covered descent while maintaining control

entered.detail: blue and white directional signs indicating highway exit information
curved road branching off from the main highway, covered in snow
snow-covered slope rising on the right side of the exit ramp
road signs providing directions for the exit route

segments.scene_description: The truck continues driving on the highway before taking an exit ramp. The scene transitions to a curved descent with guardrails on the right and snow-covered embankments. Directional signs guide the way as the truck navigates the snowy exit ramp, with street lights continuing to illuminate the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin during a nighttime snowstorm, moving from steady highway cruising to a complete stop at a city intersection. It begins with the truck gliding along a snow-covered road, where the dashboard and steering wheel frame a view of street lights cutting through the heavy snowfall. As the vehicle approaches an intersection, the forward momentum slows and the cabin interior is bathed in a deep red glow from a traffic signal. The scene then shifts as the light turns green, prompting the truck to accelerate forward and pass a waiting blue car. Finally, the camera continues its journey through the storm, leaving the intersection behind as the road stretches ahead into the dark.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a truck transitions from a straight highway onto a winding, snow-covered exit ramp. It begins with the vehicle maintaining its course on the main road before steering away from the primary lanes. As the truck enters the exit, the scene shifts into a curved descent where the open highway is replaced by restrictive guardrails and deep, snow-covered embankments. The camera then follows the bend of the ramp, guided by directional signs and the steady glow of street lights that illuminate the falling snow. Finally, the movement settles into the rhythm of the descent as the truck navigates the snowy curve toward its destination.
